summary: Critical missing pieces prevent execution: VersionBumper.Tests.ps1 and all fixture files absent. Workflow references non-existent fixtures/commits.txt and fixtures/{patch,minor,major}-bump/ dirs. Workflow doesn't implement required test harness: no `act` invocation, no act-result.txt artifact, no output validation (spec requires capturing results and asserting exact values like '1.2.0'). Action pinning missing (line 7: `actions/checkout@v4` unpinned). Repetitive workflow: lines 36-70 (3 identical scenarios) should be factored into loop/composite action. PowerShell missing `Set-StrictMode` and parameter validation. `-SkipPublisherCheck` (line 12) bypasses security. Temp dirs created but never cleaned. Scenario steps don't validate output or capture status.
